tool.name: cvss_calculator
tool.description: Calculate CVSS scores for vulnerability severity assessment.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Calculate CVSS v3.1 scores from individual metrics - Calculate CVSS v4.0 scores - Parse existing CVSS vector strings - Assess vulnerability severity for prioritization - Get remediation timeline recommendations based on severity

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The calculation action: - calculate_v3: Calculate CVSS v3.1 score from individual metrics - calculate_v4: Calculate CVSS v4.0 score (simplified) - parse_vector: Parse existing CVSS vector string

parameter.name: vector
parameter.description: CVSS vector string (for parse_vector action). E.g., "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"

parameter.name: av
parameter.description: Attack Vector: N=Network, A=Adjacent, L=Local, P=Physical

returns.description: CVSS score, severity rating, vector string, subscores, and remediation recommendations

tool.examples:
# Calculate CVSS v3.1 score (Critical RCE)
calculate_v3 N L N N U H H H
# Parse existing vector
parse_vector CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H
